race.comment: LITTLE ONE (3) broke his maiden last start over the mile here at this track, scoring by 4 lengths. Not much tougher this time and is a big chance to go back-to-back. DUCK DUCK DUCK (7) turned in a sound effort last time but found one better at this track over this track and trip, beaten half a length. Only needs to hold his form under the light weight of the 4kg claim and he can go one better. CONJOIN (2) showed early speed from an outside draw last time to lead throughout and score by a neck over 1200m at this track. Finds a suitable race to keep the ball rolling. SEA ROADS (4) lines up on the back of finishing fourth over 1867m at this track. Generally goes well here with a win and three minor placings from nine tries. Ticks all the right boxes. HAMILTON BROWN (6) was only denied but a lip at Hawker last time. Little bit tougher this time but he's in the mix.
